data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario behavior, but prior evidence indicates a failure in validating explicit use case need #7 due to an HTTP 400 error. This failure suggests that the necessary conditions to validate the persona scenario are not met, creating a gap in the expected results. Specifically, the failure in the prior step directly affects the ability to confirm the scenario behavior or produce a clear failure report as required.
gaps: Validation of explicit use case need #7 failed due to an invalid request body.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
